com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage

Class CustomerDataFile

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFile
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable

    public class CustomerDataFile
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable

    CustomerDataFile is user interface to representation of files and directories from a printer storage such as USB and HDD.

    Since:
    API 5

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CustomerDataFile(android.content.Context context, MassStorageInfo storageInfo, java.lang.String pathname)
      Creates a new CustomerDataFile instance from pathname

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean createNewFile()
      Atomically creates a new, empty file named by this pathname.
      boolean delete()
      Deletes the file or directory.
      boolean exists()
      Returns true if the file or the directory by pathname exists.
      java.lang.String getName()
      Returns the name of the file or directory.
      java.lang.String getPackageName()
      Returns the package path for accessing the storage.
      CustomerDataFile getParentFile()
      Returns the CustomerDataFile of this pathname's parent.
      java.lang.String getPath()
      Returns the pathname string of the file or directory.
      MassStorageInfo getStorageInfo()
      Returns the Storage information of the file or directory denoted by pathname.
      boolean isDirectory()
      Returns true if the file by pathname is a directory.
      boolean isFile()
      Returns true if the file by pathname is a file.
      boolean isRoot()
      Returns true if path is home folder
      long lastModified()
      Returns the time that the file was last modified.
      long length()
      Returns the length of the file.
      CustomerDataFile[] listFiles()
      Returns an array of CustomerDataFile.
      boolean mkdir()
      Creates the directory.
      boolean renameTo(CustomerDataFile dest)
      Renames the file to the destination.

    • Constructor Detail

      • CustomerDataFile

        public CustomerDataFile(android.content.Context context,
                        MassStorageInfo storageInfo,
                        java.lang.String pathname)

        Creates a new CustomerDataFile instance from pathname

        Parameters:
        context - The Context object for your activity or application
        storageInfo - Storage information
        pathname - A pathname string
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - If context, storageInfo and pathname arguments are null.
        Since:
        API 5
